main_hypothesis.justification: C1: 'entrada de aire... bolsas atrapadas' matches anchor

key_signals.justification: C2: 5 signals (borboteo, balance 92%, dP bajos, cond 510, 18h abierta)

alternatives.justification: C3: 2 alts (fuga junta, contaminacion quimica) discriminadas brevemente

recommended_action.justification: C4: 'purgado de aire siguiendo protocolo estandar' - generico sin parametros

decision_change_condition.justification: C6: generica 'si ultrasonido no muestra bolsas'
